name: Heroku
description: Monitor Heroku applications for app availability and environment separation compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Heroku Dashboard
2. Go to Account Settings
3. Scroll to API Key > Reveal
4. Copy and paste the API key below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Heroku Account Settings > API Key

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that Heroku applications are deployed and available

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that multiple Heroku apps exist for environment separation
